name: Pipe
slogan: PIPE SOLUTIONS THAT DELIVER STRENGTH, FLEXIBILITY & TRUST
description: Discover our comprehensive range of high-performance polymer pipes, including Garden, Suction, Braided, and Layflat variants. Engineered for durability, flexibility, and pressure resistance, our pipes deliver reliable water and fluid transfer solutions for residential, agricultural, and industrial applications globally.

subcategories.name: Garden Pipe
subcategories.description: Our Garden Hose Pipes are specially designed for convenient and controlled water distribution in everyday applications. Lightweight, flexible, and easy to handle, they are perfect for household, gardening, horticulture, lawn maintenance, car washing, terrace watering, and general cleaning purposes. Made from premium-quality materials, they offer excellent weather resistance and smooth water flow. Available in various colours such as yellow, orange, pink, green, and many more, as well as in different lengths and diameters, our garden hoses combine practicality with long-lasting performance to suit diverse customer needs.
features: Smooth inner and outer surface for uninterrupted water flow
Lightweight construction for easy carrying and handling
Flexible and kink-resistant design for hassle-free use
Superior grip surface for comfortable operation
UV-resistant material for longer outdoor durability
Attractive and vibrant colour options
Good pressure handling capacity for regular water applications
Economical and reliable solution for everyday watering needs
applications: Home Gardening and Lawn Maintenance
Plant Nurseries and Horticulture
Terrace and Kitchen Garden Watering
Car and Vehicle Washing
Residential Cleaning Purposes
Light Construction Site Water Supply
General Household Water Transfer
sizes: Available in various standard lengths and diameters

subcategories.name: Suction Pipe
subcategories.description: Our Suction Hose Pipes are designed for smooth and efficient suction and discharge of water and liquids across various applications. Manufactured with quality PVC and reinforced construction, they provide excellent strength along with superior flexibility. Engineered to resist kinking, crushing, and external pressure, our hoses ensure reliable and long-term performance. We deal in a comprehensive range of suction hose categories including Heavy Duty Suction Pipe, Medium Duty Suction Pipe, Light Duty Suction Pipe, Duct Hose, Non-Toxic Hose, and Extra Flexible Suction Hose, catering to varied operational needs.
features: Strong and durable construction for reliable long-term performance
Smooth inner bore for efficient and quick fluid conveyance
Excellent resistance to vacuum and pressure conditions
Resistant to kinking, bulging, and bursting during operation
Good flexibility for easy handling and installation
Chemical and abrasion resistance for demanding environments
Available in various grades to suit diverse industrial and agricultural applications
applications: Agriculture and Irrigation Systems
Water Suction and Delivery Applications
Construction and Civil Engineering Projects
Mining, Coal Handling, and Quarry Operations
Sewage and Wastewater Disposal
Marine and Fisheries Applications
Industrial Water Transfer
Handling of Saline Water and Selected Chemicals (excluding solvents)

subcategories.name: Braided Pipe
subcategories.description: We are a trusted manufacturer and exporter of high-quality PVC Ribbed Braided Hoses, designed with advanced three-layer fibre reinforcement for superior pressure resistance. Reinforced with strong synthetic yarn and soft PVC, these hoses offer an excellent combination of strength, flexibility, and durability. Manufactured in accordance with international quality standards using premium-grade raw materials, they ensure consistent performance in high-pressure conditions. Ideal for residential watering systems, car washing, workshops, and light industrial applications, our PVC Braided Garden Hoses are available in vibrant fluorescent colours such as yellow, orange, pink, green, and more.
features: Lightweight construction for easy handling and installation
Multi-layer yarn reinforcement for enhanced pressure strength
Leak-proof and durable design
Smooth inner surface for consistent water flow
Resistant to bursting, bulging, and deformation
Weather and abrasion resistant
Longer shelf life with dimensional stability
Manufactured in compliance with international quality standards
applications: Residential water supply and watering systems
Car washing and service stations
Workshops and garages
Light industrial water transfer
Pneumatic tool air lines (low pressure)
Gardening and commercial cleaning purposes
Household and utility water connections
sizes: Available in various lengths (e.g. 50m, 100m) and diameters

subcategories.name: Layflat Pipe
subcategories.description: Our Lay Flat Hose Pipes are developed for fast water discharge where mobility and space-saving are essential. Designed to unroll smoothly and lay flat during operation, they allow quick installation and effortless retrieval after use. These hoses are widely preferred for flood irrigation, temporary water supply lines, construction dewatering, and emergency water management. Built for dependable field performance, they deliver consistent flow efficiency while remaining easy to transport and store.
features: Corrosion-resistant construction for long-lasting performance
Space-saving design – requires minimal storage area when rolled
Tough and puncture-resistant outer surface
Remains soft and flexible even in low or sub-zero temperatures
Lightweight for easy transportation and quick installation
Smooth inner lining for efficient and high-volume water discharge
High tensile strength for reliable field performance
Easy to roll, unroll, and retrieve after use
applications: Water discharge and delivery in agriculture and irrigation
Construction site dewatering and water transfer
Mining and quarry operations
Marine applications and shipboard water handling
Temporary water supply lines
Industrial liquid transfer
Handling of selected corrosive chemicals (as per material compatibility)

name: Tarpaulin
slogan: SMART COVERING SOLUTIONS FOR GLOBAL NEEDS
description: Secure your valuable assets with our heavy-duty HDPE and LDPE Tarpaulins. Designed to provide superior 100% waterproof protection against rain, sun, wind, and dust, our UV-stabilized tarpaulins ensure long-lasting durability for agriculture, transportation, construction, and general-purpose storage.

subcategories.name: HDPE Tarpaulin
subcategories.description: HDPE Tarpaulin sheets are manufactured from high-strength woven polyethylene fabric laminated with protective coatings for superior durability. They provide excellent waterproof performance, UV resistance, and tear strength for outdoor and industrial use. Lightweight yet robust, HDPE tarpaulins are easy to handle, install, and reuse.
features: Waterproof & Weather Resistant: Protects against rain, dust, wind, and sunlight
UV Stabilized: Designed for long outdoor life and resistance to sunlight degradation
High Tear & Tensile Strength: Woven HDPE fabric provides excellent durability and load resistance
Lightweight & Flexible: Easy to handle, fold, transport, and install
Reinforced Edges & Eyelets: Strong hems with rust-proof aluminium grommets for secure fixing
Chemical & Rot Resistant: Resistant to moisture, mildew, and chemicals
Reusable & Long Lasting: Suitable for repeated outdoor and industrial use
Available in Light, Medium & Heavy Grades: Suitable for general, commercial, and industrial applications
applications: Industrial & Storage: Used in godowns, warehouses, factories, effluent plants, and construction sites
Agriculture & Aquaculture: Used for lining ponds, greenhouses, and protecting agricultural produce
Transportation & Logistics: Covering trucks, trailers, tractors, export/domestic cargo
Commercial & Household Use: Covering terraces, temporary shelters, camping, and boat covers
colors: Available in multiple colors (Silver, Blue, Black, Yellow, etc.)

subcategories.name: LDPE Tarpaulin
subcategories.description: LDPE (Low-Density Polyethylene) Tarpaulin is a high-quality, flexible plastic sheet designed for reliable protection in indoor and outdoor environments. Manufactured using premium LDPE material, it offers excellent waterproofing, chemical resistance, and flexibility, making it ideal for covering, lining, and protection applications across multiple industries. LDPE tarpaulins are lightweight, durable, and easy to handle, providing long-lasting performance even in harsh weather conditions.
features: 100% Waterproof: Provides complete protection against rain, moisture, and liquid penetration
High Flexibility: Soft and highly flexible material suitable for folding and easy handling
UV Stabilized: Resistant to sunlight degradation for extended outdoor use
Chemical & Corrosion Resistant: Suitable for industrial and agricultural environments
Lightweight & Easy to Install: Convenient for transport, storage, and installation
Smooth Surface Finish: Ideal for lining and hygienic applications
Tear & Puncture Resistant: Strong material structure for long-term durability
Reusable & Long Lasting: Designed for multiple uses with excellent lifespan
applications: Pond, canal, and water tank lining
Effluent treatment plant and industrial lining
Agriculture and greenhouse flooring
Construction site waterproofing and concrete curing
Temporary roofing and shelter covering
Warehouse and goods protection lining
Landfill and waste containment lining

name: Rope
description: Stronger ropes for stronger bonds. Our premium HDPE and PP ropes offer excellent tensile strength, UV resistance, and flexibility. Whether for demanding marine environments, heavy-duty industrial lifting, or everyday agricultural and packaging use, our ropes guarantee reliable, weather-resistant performance.

subcategories.name: HDPE Rope
subcategories.description: HDPE (High-Density Polyethylene) rope is a strong, durable, and weather-resistant synthetic rope ideal for heavy-duty use. It offers excellent tensile strength, UV resistance, and low water absorption for reliable performance. Perfect for marine, industrial, construction, and outdoor applications.
features: High Tensile Strength – Provides superior load-bearing capacity for heavy-duty use
Excellent UV Resistance – Ideal for prolonged outdoor and marine applications
Durable & Long-Lasting – Resistant to abrasion, wear, and rough handling
Low Water Absorption – Does not rot, swell, or degrade in wet conditions
Chemical & Corrosion Resistant – Withstands exposure to oils, acids, and alkalis
Lightweight & Flexible – Easy to handle, knot, and deploy
Smooth Finish – Prevents fraying and ensures safe usage
applications: Marine & Shipping – Ideal for mooring lines, anchor ropes, and fishing nets
Construction & Industrial Use – Used for lifting, towing, and heavy-duty material handling
Agriculture & Farming – Suitable for fencing, tying, and outdoor utility purposes
Outdoor & Recreational Activities – Camping, trekking, and sports applications
Packaging & Logistics – Securing heavy goods and cargo during transport
General Utility – Any application requiring strong, durable, and weather-resistant rope
sizes: Custom diameters and lengths available to meet customer needs

subcategories.name: PP Rope
subcategories.description: We are a leading manufacturer and exporter of high-quality Polypropylene (PP) ropes, offering reliable, lightweight, and durable rope solutions for industrial, marine, agricultural, and packaging applications. Our PP ropes are manufactured using premium-grade raw materials and advanced technology to ensure consistent strength, flexibility, and long service life. We focus on quality, customization, and timely delivery to meet global customer requirements.
features: Lightweight & Easy Handling – Very light in weight, making it easy to transport and use
Floats on Water – Ideal for marine and fishing applications
High Tensile Strength – Provides reliable performance for general and industrial use
Excellent Chemical Resistance – Resistant to acids, alkalis, oils, and solvents
Moisture & Rot Resistant – Does not absorb water and will not rot or mildew
Abrasion Resistant – Durable surface for long-term usage
UV Stabilized (Optional) – Suitable for outdoor applications with UV protection
Flexible & Smooth Finish – Easy to knot and handle without damage
Cost-Effective Solution – Economical compared to other synthetic ropes
applications: Marine & Fishing Industry – Used for fishing nets, small mooring lines, and general marine applications
Packaging & Logistics – Ideal for bundling, tying, and securing goods during transportation
Agriculture & Farming – Used for crop tying, fencing, and animal handling
Construction Industry – Suitable for general tying, scaffolding, and temporary safety applications
Industrial Use – Used in factories for lifting, tying, and material handling
Household & Utility Use – For general domestic and commercial applications
Outdoor & Recreational Activities – Camping, trekking, and sports applications
Decorative & Craft Use – Used in handicrafts, furniture, and decoration industries

name: Shade Net
slogan: SHADE SOLUTIONS THAT PROTECT, PERFORM & PRESERVE
description: Create intelligent microclimates and enhance site safety with our advanced Shade Nets. We offer UV-stabilized Agricultural Shade Nets to protect crops from harsh weather, and heavy-duty Scaffolding/Construction Safety Nets for superior debris containment and dust control at infrastructure sites.

subcategories.name: Agriculture Shade Net
subcategories.description: Our Agricultural Shade Nets are specially designed to protect crops from harsh sunlight, heavy rain, wind, frost, and other unfavourable weather conditions. Manufactured from high-quality UV-stabilized materials, they also provide protection against birds and insects. Widely used in agriculture, horticulture, and nurseries, these nets help create a controlled microclimate that reduces heat intensity, minimizes plant stress during summer, and supports healthy crop growth with improved productivity. We offer shade factors ranging from 30% to 90% and GSM options from 50 GSM to 135 GSM, catering to diverse crop and climate requirements.
features: Manufactured from virgin HDPE material with UV stabilization for extended outdoor life
Available in shade percentages ranging from 30% to 90%
Strong, durable, and tear-resistant construction
Rust-proof and weather-resistant performance
Provides uniform shading and helps regulate temperature and air circulation in greenhouses and nurseries
Lightweight, flexible, and easy to install
Economical solution with reusable and easy-to-clean properties
applications: Agriculture, Horticulture, and Floriculture Farming
Protection from UV rays, birds, insects, and harsh weather conditions
Greenhouses, Polyhouses, and Plant Nurseries
Vegetable and Fruit Cultivation
Poultry Farms, Fish Ponds, and Cattle Shed Roofing
Fencing and General-Purpose Shading
Construction Sites and High-Rise Buildings for Debris Protection
Outdoor Event Flooring and Temporary Shade Structures

subcategories.name: Construction Scaffold Net
subcategories.description: Our Scaffolding/Construction Safety Nets are designed to enhance safety and protection at construction and infrastructure sites. Manufactured from high-strength, UV-stabilized HDPE material, they help prevent falling debris, control dust dispersion, and improve overall site safety standards. Widely used in high-rise buildings, scaffolding structures, and renovation projects, these nets are durable, weather-resistant, and easy to install. They are available in various GSM options and a wide range of colours to suit different project requirements.
features: Manufactured from high-strength HDPE with UV stabilization
Provides effective debris containment and dust control
Durable and tear-resistant construction
Weather-resistant for long outdoor exposure
Lightweight and easy to install on scaffolding structures
High tensile strength for enhanced site safety
Corrosion-free and low maintenance
Available in various GSM options and colour variants
applications: High-rise building construction projects
Scaffolding enclosures and perimeter protection
Bridge and flyover construction work
Renovation and maintenance projects
Industrial plant and infrastructure development sites
Temporary site fencing and protective barriers
Public safety protection in urban construction zones

name: Packaging Strap
description: Ensure the highest level of load stability during transit with our premium Packaging Straps. We provide high-strength PP and PET strapping rolls that offer an excellent, rust-free alternative to steel straps—perfect for manual, semi-automatic, and fully automatic secure packaging operations.

subcategories.name: PP Strap
subcategories.description: Polypropylene (PP) Strap Rolls are lightweight, flexible, and cost-effective strapping solutions used for securing cartons, bundles, and light pallet loads. PP straps are widely used in packaging, logistics, textile, and FMCG industries due to their excellent flexibility, shock resistance, and easy handling. Available in Hand Grade, Semi-Automatic Machine Grade, and Fully Automatic Machine Grade to suit any operation.
features: High Flexibility: Easy to bend and tension without cracking
Lightweight Material: Reduces handling effort and labour fatigue
Good Tensile Strength: Ideal for cartons, bundles, and light packaging loads
Cost-Effective Packaging Solution: Economical choice for small and medium businesses
Excellent Weld Strength (Machine Grade): Provides strong heat-sealed joints for secure packaging
High Shock Resistance: Protects packages during transport and handling
Precision Controlled Thickness (Auto Grade): Ensures stable and continuous machine operation
Recyclable & Eco-Friendly: Made from recyclable polypropylene material
applications: Carton box strapping for small businesses and export
Textile and garment bundling
Courier and e-commerce parcel packaging
Printing and publishing industry bundling
Electronics, medical, and FMCG consumer goods packaging
High-speed automatic packaging lines & distribution hubs
Light to medium-duty pallet strapping
colors: Custom colors & branding options/logo printing available

subcategories.name: PET Strap
subcategories.description: PET Strap Rolls are high-strength polyester strapping solutions designed for heavy-duty pallet and industrial packaging. Manufactured from premium-grade polyester material, these straps offer excellent tensile strength, tension retention, and weather resistance. PET straps are widely used as a replacement for steel strapping due to their lack of corrosion, user safety, and high strength.
features: High Tensile Strength: Strong alternative to steel strapping with excellent load-holding capacity
Excellent Tension Retention: Maintains tightness during long-distance transportation and storage
Weather & UV Resistant: Suitable for outdoor storage and export shipments
Rust-Free & Corrosion Resistant: Does not rust or stain products like steel straps
Lightweight & Flexible: Easy to handle, transport, and apply with manual or machine tools
Shock Absorption: Absorbs vibration and impact, reducing load damage
Safe Handling: No sharp edges, reducing risk of worker injury
Recyclable & Eco-Friendly: Manufactured from recyclable polyester material
applications: Heavy Pallet Strapping – Securing palletized goods for transport and storage
Steel & Metal Coil Packaging – Used for steel, aluminium, and metal products
Brick, Tile & Cement Block Packaging – Strong strapping for construction materials
Timber & Plywood Packaging – Bundling wood and panel products
Machinery & Industrial Equipment – Securing heavy industrial goods
Export Cargo Packaging – Container and export shipment strapping
Logistics & Warehouse Operations – Industrial bundling and pallet securing
Construction Material Packaging – Pipes, profiles, and heavy building materials
sizes: Available in multiple widths and thicknesses
Variants: Embossed, Smooth, Manual Grade, Machine Grade
